items.title: Lloyd's algorithm loop
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  init["Initialize k centroids"] --> assign["Assign each point to nearest centroid"]
  assign --> update["Update each centroid as cluster mean"]
  update --> check{"Assignments changed?"}
  check -->|yes| assign
  check -->|no| done["Converged partition"]
items.caption: Lloyd's algorithm repeats assignment and centroid update until cluster memberships stabilize.

items.title: k-means geometry in 2D
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  pts["Data points"] --> dist["Squared Euclidean distance to centroids"]
  dist --> part["Hard partition into k groups"]
  part --> cent["Centroids = per-cluster means"]
  cent --> wcss["Minimize within-cluster sum of squares"]
items.caption: k-means optimizes compact, spherical groups by minimizing total squared distance to centroids.
